essence: Sorts, processes, and manages recyclable materials to reduce waste and support environmental sustainability.

identity.title: Recycling Operative
identity.summary: Sorts, processes, and handles recyclable materials in facilities or depots, ensuring safe and efficient recycling operations.

salary.notes: Team leaders, machinery operators, and materials specialists can exceed £35k-£40k+.

qualifications: Understanding of recycling categories and contamination rules
Ability to operate sorting equipment and machinery
Awareness of environmental and waste‑handling regulations

lifestyle.description: Recycling operatives work in recycling centres, materials recovery facilities, or depots, sorting and processing recyclable materials. The role involves operating machinery, identifying materials, preventing contamination, and maintaining safety and cleanliness. It suits individuals who enjoy routine, teamwork, and contributing to environmental sustainability.

habits: Follows strict safety and hygiene procedures
Keeps work areas clean and organised
